name: app-font-size-scaling

checklist.summary: User confirmed implementation could proceed, then requested adding 150 percent as the maximum font scale. Checklist was updated to include 150 percent and implementation continued.

notes: Initial review recommends scoping v1 to DOM UI font scaling only. Canvas-drawn text requires separate technical clarification if required.

Product clarification recorded: A/A/A/A means DOM UI only, fixed 100/110/120/130 percent options, current-user local preference, and required coverage of settings, toolbar, major modals, chat, projects, and meetings.
Checklist refined to require final MCP browser-tool validation on the real page.
Checklist confirmed by user and todolist created.
Scope changed after implementation started: user requested adding 150 percent as the maximum font scale. Checklist updated accordingly.
Implementation completed and validated with automated tests plus MCP browser checks. Waiting for user confirmation of tested status.
